message:
feat(messaging): recoverable stream snapshots, stream snapshot/restore lifecycle, and redelivery oracle idempotent tracking

src/messaging/snapshot.rs (+508):
- Add RecoverableStreamSnapshot for cut-certified stream state capture
  with consumer attachments, obligation frontier, and epoch fencing
- Add StreamConsumerSnapshot, RestoredStreamConsumerState (with lease
  invalidation), StreamRestoreScrubSummary (credential stripping,
  reply-space rebinding)
- Add RestoredStreamSnapshot with full restore lifecycle: verify epoch
  fence, invalidate consumer leases, apply scrub summary, emit
  structured restore-time diagnostics
- Add StreamSnapshotError with 6 variants (EpochMismatch, EmptyFrontier,
  ScrubFailure, RestoreValidation, ConsumerRestoreFailure, StreamError)
- Add comprehensive tests: round-trip capture/restore, epoch fence
  rejection, consumer lease invalidation, scrub summary application

src/messaging/stream.rs (+205):
- Add Hash derive to RetentionPolicy, CapturePolicy, StreamConfig,
  StreamState, StreamRecord for snapshot hashing
- Add StreamSnapshot and Stream::snapshot()/restore_from_snapshot()
  for in-memory stream state capture and replay
- Add snapshot round-trip tests

src/messaging/mod.rs:
- Re-export new snapshot types: RecoverableStreamSnapshot,
  RestoredStreamConsumerState, RestoredStreamSnapshot,
  StreamConsumerSnapshot, StreamRestoreScrubSummary, StreamSnapshotError

src/lab/oracle/fabric.rs (+77):
- Fix FabricRedeliveryOracle::track_message() to be idempotent: re-tracking
  preserves already-observed redeliveries and only tightens the bound,
  preventing late/duplicate tracking from erasing evidence
- Add bound_explicit field to FabricRedeliveryRecord
- Add tests: duplicate tracking preserves history, late tracking preserves
  prior observations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
